## Mock-only Confirmation

- [ ] I confirm this request contains only fictional mock data.
- [ ] I did not include real WeChat chats, real Git data, real recordings, real company names, real person names, real project names, real amounts, real addresses, real phone numbers, or identifiable case details.
- [ ] I did not request legal advice or a legal outcome guarantee.

## Use Case

Describe the open-source use case.

## Desired Capability

Describe what the project should support.

## Mock Data Representation

Can this be represented with fictional mock data?

## Privacy Boundary

Explain how the feature keeps real private material out of issues, pull requests, discussions, tests, and examples.

## Alternatives

Describe any simpler option.
